claim_boundary: diagnostic tower-geometry and ABC-runtime evidence only
no tower advantage or disadvantage claim
no claim that the counterpoint environment is degenerate

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The contraction-fraction sweep completed its artifact contract.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The sweep cannot yet support human-readable diagnosis.
goal_criteria.failure_signal: run index or core result tables are missing
goal_criteria.partial_signal: some arms or summary tables are missing
goal_criteria.question: Did every requested arm produce required evidence?
goal_criteria.success_signal: all required result tables exist and every requested n/18 arm is represented

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The evaluation identifies the observed first-tier collapse threshold under current BBB/state_collapser schema semantics.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The evaluation cannot distinguish threshold behavior.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: collapse status exists for only part of the sweep
goal_criteria.question: Does the sweep reveal whether collapse emerges gradually or immediately?
goal_criteria.success_signal: collapse_threshold_summary.csv reports first collapse and last nontrivial n

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The sweep endpoint is comparable to the prior one-third diagnostic.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The sweep endpoint cannot be compared to the prior one-third diagnostic.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: equivalence is checked but mixed across instances or seeds
goal_criteria.question: Does 6/18 reproduce the old one-third first block?

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The evaluation distinguishes constructed quotient shape from live executable control surface.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The evaluation risks confusing quotient construction with execution.
goal_criteria.question: Can a human tell which tiers are actually executable?
goal_criteria.success_signal: active action-cell counts, tier occupancy, lift, and concrete steps are summarized

structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: The first scheduled block collapses all base states into one state cell.

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: marks quotient geometry as structurally limiting
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: One tier-1 cell contains at least 90 percent of base states.
The sweep endpoint is not comparable to the prior one-third diagnostic.
structural_limit_checks.trigger: n06_over_18 selected edge set differs from old one-third block 0

structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: The sweep is not a clean contraction-width threshold experiment.
structural_limit_checks.trigger: selected edges are not nested across increasing n
